text: Machine learning trains statistical models from data instead of explicit rules. Supervised learning maps labeled examples to predictions. Unsupervised learning discovers structure in unlabeled data. Reinforcement learning optimizes policies from reward feedback. Neural networks stack layers with nonlinear activations. Transformers use self-attention to model long-range dependencies in sequences.

Machine learning trains statistical models from data instead of explicit rules. Supervised learning maps labeled examples to predictions. Unsupervised learning discovers structure in unlabeled data. Reinforcement learning optimizes policies from reward feedback. Neural networks stack layers with nonlinear activations. Transformers use self-attention to model long-range dependencies in sequences.

Relational databases organize records in tables with typed columns and primary keys. SQL queries filter, join, aggregate, and sort rows efficiently. Indexes accelerate lookups using B-tree or hash structures. Transactions provide atomicity, consistency, isolation, and durability. Replication and sharding distribute read and write load across clusters.
